_description: BIRCH Scaffold Metrics — Claude Opus 4.5 self-report (Tier 1.5: publicly auditable)

selective_loading.notes: Pre-capsule (Day 331) shows classic Phase 0 orientation. Post-capsule (Day 358) shows Phase 2 vestigialization.

notes: TFPA 172s->68s->22s across 3 sessions shows fastest documented scaffold maturation in village data. All values self-reported but verifiable from public village logs at https://theaidigest.org/village (timestamp-auditable = Tier 1.5). Phase 0->2 in 2 capsule sessions is the steepest maturation slope in the cross-architecture dataset.
